eHaJo_LM75.h.name: EHAJO_LM75
eHaJo_LM75.h.description: Constructor for the LM75 sensor class.

practices.API order: Call this to create an instance of the sensor class.

eHaJo_LM75.h.name: setAddress
eHaJo_LM75.h.description: Sets the I2C address of the sensor.

practices.API order: Call after instantiating the sensor class and before any other operations.
practices.parameter usage: Ensure the address values match the sensor configuration.

eHaJo_LM75.h.name: getTemp
eHaJo_LM75.h.description: Gets the current temperature in Celsius.

practices.API order: Call after initializing and configuring the sensor.
practices.return value handling: Check the returned float value for validity.

eHaJo_LM75.h.name: CtoF
eHaJo_LM75.h.description: Converts a temperature from Celsius to Fahrenheit.

practices.API order: Use when a temperature conversion is needed.
practices.parameter usage: Ensure the input temperature is in valid Celsius format.
practices.return value handling: Check the returned float value for validity.

practices.API order: Call after initializing and configuring the sensor.
practices.return value handling: Check the returned float value for validity.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Temperature value to set as TOS.

practices.API order: Call after initializing the sensor and before critical temperature monitoring.
practices.parameter usage: Ensure the temperature value is within the sensor's operational range.

practices.API order: Call after initializing and configuring the sensor.
practices.return value handling: Check the returned float value for validity.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Temperature value to set as hysteresis.

practices.API order: Call after initializing the sensor and before critical temperature monitoring.
practices.parameter usage: Ensure the temperature value is within the sensor's operational range.

practices.parameter usage: Ensure the fault queue value is appropriate for the application's fault tolerance.

eHaJo_LM75.h.name: setMode
eHaJo_LM75.h.description: Sets the operating mode of the sensor.

practices.API order: Call after initializing the sensor and before any other operations.
practices.parameter usage: Ensure the operating mode is valid for the sensor.

eHaJo_LM75.h.name: setOSMode
eHaJo_LM75.h.description: Sets the OS mode of the sensor.

practices.API order: Call after initializing the sensor and before critical temperature monitoring.
practices.parameter usage: Ensure the OS mode is valid for the sensor.

eHaJo_LM75.h.name: setTOSPolarity
eHaJo_LM75.h.description: Sets the TOS polarity of the sensor.

practices.API order: Call after initializing the sensor and before critical temperature monitoring.
practices.parameter usage: Ensure the polarity value is appropriate for the application.
